characters.appearance: Young adult male, slim build, brown complexion, short black hair. He wears wire-rimmed glasses.
characters.wardrobe: Black t-shirt with a small pink graphic on the left chest.
characters.demeanor: Curious, engaged, looking down at his phone as if on a video call.

characters.appearance: Female-presenting humanoid robot. White/silver metallic face and body with human-like facial features and a blank, neutral expression.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मुझे English सीखनी है, कल मेरा interview है। [I want to learn English, I have an interview tomorrow.]
Character B says: अपनी English speaking improve करना चाहते हो, है ना? [You want to improve your English speaking, right?]
Character A says: हाँ, पर क्या आप मुझे हिंदी में समझाएंगे? [Yes, but will you explain it to me in Hindi?]
Character B says: हाँ बिल्कुल, मैं हिंदी में ही मदद करूंगी। आपका goal English बोलना सीखना है ना? [Yes definitely, I will help in Hindi. Your goal is to learn to speak English, right?]
Character A says: हाँ, English बोलने की बहुत इच्छा है, पर मेरे पास time भी कम रहता है। मैं क्या करूँ? [Yes, I really want to speak English, but I have very little time. What should I do?]
Character B says: इसीलिए तो Supernova ऐप है! रोज़ सिर्फ 15-20 मिनट मेरे साथ practice करो, और धीरे-धीरे confident English बोलना सीख जाओगे। [That's what the Supernova app is for! Practice with me for just 15-20 minutes daily, and gradually you'll learn to speak confident English.]
Character A says: ओह, पर क्या इसमें real teacher से बात होगी? [Oh, but will I talk to a real teacher in this?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the user with a relatable real-world problem (upcoming interview).
- Establishes the app's core value proposition: Hindi-medium support for English learning.
- Addresses common objections (lack of time) while introducing Supernova as a practical, daily habit.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
मुझे English सीखनी है, कल मेरा interview है (I want to learn English, I have an interview tomorrow)
अपनी English speaking improve करना चाहते हो, है ना? (You want to improve your English speaking, right?)
हाँ, पर क्या आप मुझे हिंदी में समझाएंगे? (Yes, but will you explain it to me in Hindi?)
हाँ बिल्कुल, मैं हिंदी में ही मदद करूंगी। आपका goal English बोलना सीखना है ना? (Yes definitely, I will help in Hindi. Your goal is to learn to speak English, right?)
हाँ, English बोलने की बहुत इच्छा है, पर मेरे पास time भी कम रहता है। मैं क्या करूँ? (Yes, I really want to speak English, but I have very little time. What should I do?)
इसीलिए तो Supernova ऐप है! रोज़ सिर्फ 15-20 मिनट मेरे साथ practice करो, और धीरे-धीरे confident English बोलना सीख जाओगे (That's what the Supernova app is for! Practice with me for just 15-20 minutes daily, and gradually you'll learn to speak confident English.)
ओह, पर क्या इसमें real teacher से बात होगी? (Oh, but will I talk to a real teacher in this?)

scenes.supernova_script: Character B says: इसमें मैं आपकी AI tutor हूँ। मैं आपको step-by-step guide करूंगी, आपकी गलतियां सुधारूंगी, और सबसे अच्छी बात—यहाँ आपको कोई judge नहीं करेगा। [In this, I am your AI tutor. I will guide you step-by-step, correct your mistakes, and the best part—no one will judge you here.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Directly answers the user's doubt about teachers by introducing the AI tutor feature.
- Highlights the emotional benefit of AI: a safe, judgment-free space to make mistakes.
- Visually demonstrates the app's interface and real-time grammar correction.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
इसमें मैं आपकी AI tutor हूँ। मैं आपको step-by-step guide करूंगी, आपकी गलतियां सुधारूंगी, और सबसे अच्छी बात—यहाँ आपको कोई judge नहीं करेगा (In this, I am your AI tutor. I will guide you step-by-step, correct your mistakes, and the best part—no one will judge you here.)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: हाँ, ये सुनने में तो बहुत सही लग रहा है। Try करना चाहिए। [Yes, this sounds very good. I should try it.]
Character B says: आज ही Supernova ऐप download करो। लाखों लोग Supernova के साथ रोज़ practice कर रहे हैं। [Download the Supernova app today. Lakhs of people are practicing daily with Supernova.]
Character B says: हमारे affordable plans के साथ आज ही शुरुआत करो और confident English बोलने के लिए तैयार हो जाओ। [Start today with our affordable plans and get ready to speak confident English.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Provides social proof by mentioning lakhs of active learners.
- Delivers a clear, encouraging Call to Action to download the app.
- Replaces specific competitor pricing with a focus on affordability and the ultimate goal of speaking confidently.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:

आज ही Supernova ऐप download करो। लाखों लोग Supernova के साथ रोज़ practice कर रहे हैं (Download the Supernova app today. Lakhs of people are practicing daily with Supernova.)
